jisoo.name: JISOO
jisoo.label: BLISSOO Entertainment
jisoo.project: Starring in the Korean drama series Boyfriend on Demand.
jisoo.bio: Jisoo is a multi-talented South Korean singer and actress who debuted with Blackpink in 2016. As the eldest member and lead vocalist, she is celebrated for her distinct, husky vocal tone. In 2023, she made a record-breaking solo musical debut with her hit single "Flower." Beyond music, Jisoo is an acclaimed actress, starring in the popular television drama Snowdrop. Her massive cultural influence extends into high fashion, where she serves as a global ambassador for Dior.

jennie.name: JENNIE
jennie.label: ODD ATELIER (OA)
jennie.project: Starring in the variety show The Secret Friends Club
jennie.bio: Jennie is a versatile South Korean singer and rapper who debuted with Blackpink in 2016. As the group's main rapper and lead vocalist, she is famous for her fierce stage presence. In 2018, she became the first member to go solo with her chart-topping single "Solo." Beyond music, she made her Hollywood acting debut in the HBO television series The Idol. A powerhouse in high fashion, Jennie serves as a prominent global ambassador for the luxury brand Chanel.

rose.name: ROSÉ
rose.label: THE BLACK LABEL
rose.brands: Saint Laurent, YSL Beauty, Tiffany & Co., Rimowa, Puma, Levi's
rose.bio: Rosé is a talented Korean-New Zealand singer and dancer who debuted with Blackpink in 2016. As the group's main vocalist, she is globally recognized for her highly distinct, emotional, and dreamy voice. In 2021, she made a historic solo debut with her record-shattering single album R. Beyond music, Rosé is a massive style icon, serving as a global ambassador for luxury powerhouses Saint Laurent and Tiffany & Co. Her undeniable charisma and vocal prowess have firmly cemented her status as a definitive modern pop idol.

lisa.name: LISA
lisa.label: LLOUD Co
lisa.project: The HBO Series - THE WHITE LOTUS (S3).
lisa.bio: Lisa is a phenomenal Thai rapper and dancer who debuted with Blackpink in 2016. As the group's main dancer and lead rapper, she is globally celebrated for her unparalleled stage presence. She launched a historic solo career with her record-shattering single album LALISA and her independent label LLOUD. Beyond music, she expanded her career into Hollywood by acting in the acclaimed series The White Lotus. A monumental force in high fashion, Lisa dominates the industry as a premier global ambassador for Louis Vuitton.
